title: Anthropic 通过财务、工程和设计插件推出了针对企业代理的新推送
content: 这是扩大 Anthropic 企业客户群的重大机会，也是对当前执行这些功能的 SaaS 产品的重大威胁。
original_title: Anthropic launches new push for enterprise agents with plug-ins for finance, engineering, and design
original_content: It's a major opportunity to grow Anthropic’s enterprise client base — and a significant threat to SaaS products currently performing those functions.

title: New Relic 推出新的 AI 代理平台和 OpenTelemetry 工具
content: New Relic 为企业提供更多可观察性工具，让他们创建和管理 AI 代理，并更好地集成 OTel 数据流。
original_title: New Relic launches new AI agent platform and OpenTelemetry tools
original_content: New Relic is giving enterprises more observability tools, letting them create and manage AI agents, and better integrate OTel data streams.

title: 西班牙‘soonicorn’MultiverseComputing发布免费压缩AI模型
content: 西班牙初创公司 MultiverseComputing 在 Hugging Face 上发布了 HyperNova 60B 模型的新版本，据称该模型优于 Mistral 的模型。
original_title: Spanish ‘soonicorn’ Multiverse Computing releases free compressed AI model
original_content: Spanish startup Multiverse Computing has released a new version of its HyperNova 60B model on Hugging Face that, it says, bests Mistral's model.

title: Oura 推出专注于女性健康的专有人工智能模型
content: 该模型支持涵盖从早期月经周期到更年期的整个生殖健康范围的问题。
original_title: Oura launches a proprietary AI model focused on women’s health
original_content: The model supports questions spanning the full reproductive health spectrum, from early menstrual cycles through menopause.
